attributes.Sql Query:

FROM
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_REBATE_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NRT N_RBT,
 $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BKG
   WHERE N_RBT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > ( SELECT EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$STGDB.WI_N_REBATES_ADJ_LN_INCR )
     AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_REBATE_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NRAL
                       WHERE NRAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT = N_RBT.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT )
